feature_files_ephemeral.note: temporary extracted BGO2 files; regenerate from source_root_files

poisson_response.primaryHitDefinition: any of 30 segments has Npe >= fixed threshold

split: even eventID train, odd eventID test, independently per sample

fixed_tlc_binary_response.primary_definition: any detector segment has Npe >= fixed threshold

matched_pm1_ablation.definition: any TLC segment in the BGO/TH azimuth +/-1 window has Npe >= fixed threshold

event_total_npe_comparison.definition: sum over all detector segments Npe >= fixed threshold
